chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 212 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on office objection 1.For order on MA No.3419/23 3.For order on MA No.3420/23 4.For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 None present for appellant ---------- None present for appellant. Same was the case on last two dates of hearing. No intimation is received in spite of office sending message by Whatsapp to appellant’s counsel. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E kAshraf
